name: Golden Valley & Dore Abbey
highlights: Cistercian abbey church still in use, set in Elgar's 'favourite little valley in England'.
points_of_interest: Dore Abbey (working church since 1147); Abbey Dore Court garden
viewpoints: Golden Valley patchwork of orchards and sheep
parking_start: Abbey Dore Court / Dore Abbey roadside parking
food_drink_nearby: The Neville Arms Abbey Dore; The Bull's Head Craswall
hazards_notes: Quiet lanes can flood; fields muddy after rain
